description: Java entity class representing application users for authentication purposes, using JPA annotations for ORM mapping.

classes.name: AppUser
classes.description: JPA entity for user data with fields like email, password, roles, and MFA settings.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Listener method to update the 'updatedAt' timestamp before saving changes.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID identifier of the user.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Checks if the user account is enabled.

methods.name: isMfaEnabled
methods.description: Checks if multi-factor authentication is enabled.

methods.name: getMfaEmail
methods.description: Gets the MFA email associated with the user.

methods.name: getRoles
methods.description: Returns set of roles assigned to the user.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID identifier for the user.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables the user account.
